faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Harrison, NY?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Harrison typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the number of treatment visits required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We employ a comprehensive approach including thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, exclusion techniques to seal entry points, and sanitation recommendations.
